task1.title: Bar Chart: Participation in Adult Activities by Age Group
task1.prompt:
The chart below shows the percentage of adults of different age groups in the UK who participated in various activities.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task2.title: Opinion: Ageing Population - Advantages Outweigh Disadvantages?
task2.prompt:
In many countries, the population is ageing, and the proportion of older people is increasing.

Do you think the advantages of having an ageing population outweigh the disadvantages?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
